name: Red Velvit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together shortening, eggs (or egg beaters), and sugar until well combined to form a paste.
2. In a separate bowl, mix cocoa powder with part of the red food coloring until it forms a paste.
3. Gradually add this cocoa mixture and the remaining food coloring to the creamed shortening mixture.
4. Sift flour and salt alternately into the batter, adding buttermilk as directed in the recipe.
5. Stir in vinegar, baking soda, and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until done by touch.
